name: harbor-wright
purpose: Misty Harbor plus Wertox-inspired aggressive candidate search and repaired-session continuity.

optimization_source.notes: Keeps the Misty Harbor playbook package and layers in a more aggressive candidate/critic profile.

adopted_patterns: critic preserve-list repair against the selected winner
canonical session promotion for the winning candidate before repair
server-side SafeThree validator parity before artifact acceptance

default_mode.notes: Higher-variance exploratory profile modeled after Wertox while preserving Misty Harbor prompts; server validation now mirrors the stricter local SafeThree validator path.
